title: Painkillers Causing Your Pain? The Hidden Cycle
description: Medication-overuse headache is WHO-recognized, globally disabling, and largely preventable — yet the OTC industry has a structural financial interest in the repeat purchases that cause it. This piece investigates the neurological mechanism behind caffeine-containing analgesic rebound, the real (and institutionally acknowledged) GI and cardiovascular risks of NSAIDs, and why the consumer is the last to know. The food additives thread is examined and largely set aside: the evidence doesn't hold.
